title: saraca declinata
intro: Saraca declinata, also known as the Ashoka tree, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Asia and is commonly used in traditional medicine. The bark and leaves of the Saraca declinata plant have been used to treat various health conditions, including menstrual disorders and fever, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Saraca declinata include its ability to balance hormonal levels, reduce inflammation, and promote menstrual regularity, making it a popular herb among women. Saraca declinata is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule for its herbal preparations.
